headline: A Look At Conagra Brands (CAG) Valuation After Earnings Miss And Cut To EPS Guidance
summary: Conagra Brands (CAG) is back in focus after its latest quarterly report, where revenue came in slightly ahead of estimates, but earnings missed, margins tightened, and full year adjusted EPS guidance was cut. See our latest analysis for Conagra Brands. That weaker quarter and cut to adjusted EPS guidance have coincided with fading momentum, with the share price down 7.28% over 30 days and 26.38% over 90 days. This has contributed to a 33.49% decline in 1 year total shareholder return and a...
